name: coTfsUseNodeId
title: coTfsUseNodeId
tables: This function instructs the node layer, for functions which accept both the node-ID and the CAN-ID as parameter, to use the node-ID. This setting is active automatically on measurement start.
Example coTfsUseNodeId();// uses node-ID for simplified functions// …coTfsUseCANid();// uses can identifier for simplified functions// …
